en.text: "And their husbands have the better right to take them back..."

ar.text: حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدٌ، أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ، حَدَّثَنَا يُونُسُ، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ، قَالَ زَوَّجَ مَعْقِلٌ أُخْتَهُ فَطَلَّقَهَا تَطْلِيقَةً‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton El-Hasani: Mekili e martoi motrën e tij, e më pas bashkëshorti i saj e shkurorëzoi atë një herë.

en.text: Ma'qil gave his sister in marriage and later her husband divorced her once.
